question: From this scatterplot of age and revenue, what can be reliably concluded about which age range earns the most?

options.A: Individuals between ages 40 and 45 clearly have the highest revenue.
options.B: Individuals between ages 45 and 55 clearly have the highest revenue.
options.C: Individuals between ages 55 and 60 clearly have the highest revenue.
options.D: The chart is too small to reliably determine which specific age range has the highest revenue.

explanation: The individuals in the chart between the ages of 45 and 55 have the highest revenue. The small size of the chart may cause difficulty in accurately identifying the specific trends of revenue in certain age ranges.
